question: PRISM utilizes a three-area Loss of Load Probability (LOLP) modeling approach, yes or no?
detailed_evidences: The PRISM (PJM Reliability Index Study Model) program is primarily used in the PJM Reserve Requirement Study (RRS) to model reliability. It utilizes a two-area Loss of Load Probability (LOLP) modeling approach consisting of: Area 1 – the PJM RTO and Area 2 – the neighboring World. This detail can be found on page 10 under the text "PJM's Probabilistic Reliability Index Study Model (PRISM) program is the primary reliability modeling tool used in the RRS. PRISM utilizes a two-area Loss of Load Probability (LOLP) modeling approach consisting of: Area 1 - the PJM RTO and Area 2 - the neighboring World" (<box>(0.15, 0.67, 0.72, 0.77)</box>, <evidence_pages>[10]</evidence_pages>, <evidence_sources>[Text]</evidence_sources>). Moreover, its utilization to calculate the Expected Weekly Maximum and contribute to the overall LOLE assessment is highlighted on page 36 under the section 'Expected Weekly Maximum (EWM)' (<box>(0.12, 0.1, 0.93, 0.24)</box>, <evidence_pages>[36]</evidence_pages>, <evidence_sources>[Text]</evidence_sources>).

question: We can set the desired time with the Up and Down buttons，yes or no?
detailed_evidences:
The manual advises using the Time Button in several steps:

1. Press the Time Button: This displays a flashing "00:00" on the screen. This is found on page 19 "BITTE BEACHTEN: Die Fleisch-Sonde wird deaktiviert. Drücken Sie die Zeit-Taste und ein blinkendes "00:00" wird angezeigt" (<box>(0.07, 0.51, 0.45, 0.53)</box>).

2. Use the Up or Down buttons to set the desired cooking time in 1-hour increments. The display continues to flash while pressing the buttons. This is mentioned on page 24, “Tryck på ”Kol” -”VIDare” knappen för att ställa in tid i steg om 1 tim gång” (<box>(0.06, 0.45, 0.47, 0.48)</box>).
   
3. Press the Time Button again to confirm the desired cooking time; the hour section stops flashing. This is noted on page 13"Die Time-Taste nach Eingabe der tijd van de wenselijke hour (Laffiche doit toujours clignoter) (<box>(0.06, 0.63, 0.47, 0.67)</box>) 

4. Next, set the minute section of the cooking time using the Up and Down buttons in 1-minute increments, similar to setting the hour. Return to page 19"Die gewunschte minute section…:00:00)) increases or decreases automatically… after this the Time- bouton”  (<box>(0.06, 0.65, 0.47, 0.72)</box>) 

5. To confirm, press the Time Button again, and both the hour and minute sections will no longer flash, indicating your settings are complete (page 24 "Tryck på att vara kl 00:00 ingen), (<box>(0.04, 0.67, 0.37, 0.69)</box>).

6. The countdown will start and the display will alternate between showing the set cooking temperature and the time remaining (page 13, "Cook Timer and actual time alternate but Time function. <box>(0.06, 0.88, 0.36, 0.95</box>)

By following these steps, users can set and utilize the Time Button properly. The evidence is present on pages 13, 19, and 24.

Middle Reef is located 6km off the coast of Townsville, in the middle of a channel between the mainland and Magnetic Island. # Insurance risk management

The risk under any one insurance contract is the possibility that the insured event occurs and the uncertainty of the amount of the resulting claim.
